title.zh: 欢迎来到KidsLab · 从一盏灯到宇宙
title.en: Welcome to KidsLab · From a Lamp to the Cosmos

description.zh: 一场 Three.js 宇宙拉远之旅：从书桌上的一盏灯，穿过城市与地球，抵达银河与宇宙深处。四行诗与轻史诗配乐随尺度生长，点击底部圆点可在六个尺度间穿梭。
description.en: A Three.js cosmic zoom-out: from a desk lamp, past the city and the Earth, to the galaxy and the deep universe. A four-line poem and a light-epic score grow with the scale — tap the dots to jump between six worlds.
